title: End-to-End Encryption
plaintextWarning: Data is stored in plaintext on S3. We recommend enabling end-to-end encryption to protect your data.
needsPasswordInfo: End-to-end encryption is enabled. Enter your password to sync.
enabledAndUnlocked: End-to-end encryption is enabled and unlocked
rememberKeyHint: Save encryption key in system keychain for automatic unlock on startup. macOS may require system password or TouchID verification.
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
newPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters
restoreKeyringPrompt: Enter your encryption password to restore the keyring on S3:
